name: Colonoscopy Procedure Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for colonoscopy procedures. Used in the colorectal cancer screening measure (COL). Colonoscopy satisfies the screening requirement for 10 years from the date of the procedure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Colonoscopy through stoma; with removal of foreign body
Colonoscopy through stoma; with control of bleeding
Colonoscopy through stoma; with removal of tumor(s), polyp(s), or other lesion(s) by hot biopsy forceps
Colonoscopy, flexible; with removal of foreign body
Colonoscopy, flexible; with biopsy, single or multiple
Colonoscopy, flexible; with directed submucosal injection(s)
Colonoscopy, flexible; with control of bleeding
Colonoscopy, flexible; with ablation of tumor(s), polyp(s)
Colonoscopy, flexible; with removal of tumor(s), polyp(s), by hot biopsy forceps
Colonoscopy, flexible; with removal of tumor(s), polyp(s), by snare technique
Colorectal cancer screening; colonoscopy on individual at high risk
Colorectal cancer screening; colonoscopy on individual not meeting criteria for high risk
